description: Default document type mappings for multi-branch workflow routing

technical.description: Technical documents including specifications, standards, and drawings

usage_notes: Add custom document types to project-specific config files
Keep this file as the default fallback
Document types are case-insensitive in matching
Supports both Vietnamese and English terminology
